heading: Accession bonus for members of the program
label: 2128 Accession bonus for members of the program

children.heading: .—Availability of Bonus
children.label: a .—Availability of Bonus
children.text: The Secretary of Defense may offer a person who enters into an agreement under an accession bonus of not more than $100,000 as part of the agreement.section 2122(a)(2) of this title

children.heading: .—Relation to Other Payments
children.label: b .—Relation to Other Payments
children.text: An accession bonus paid a person under this section is in addition to any other amounts payable to the person under this subchapter.

children.heading: .—Repayment
children.label: c .—Repayment
children.text: A person who receives an accession bonus under this section, but fails to comply with the agreement under or to commence or complete the active duty obligation imposed by , shall be subject to the repayment provisions of section 303a(e) or 373 of title 37.section 2122(a)(2) of this titlesection 2123 of this title
